name: @arubiku/pulse-lib
description: Library for generating Pulse Auth Tickets and handling client sync

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/react.ts src/zustand.ts src/protocol.ts src/store.ts --format cjs,esm --dts
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/react.ts src/zustand.ts src/protocol.ts src/store.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch
scripts.deploy:publish: npm run build && npm run npm:auth:check && npm publish --access public --userconfig .npmrc
scripts.release:auto: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run deploy:publish
scripts.bump:patch:deploy:publish: node bump.js patch && npm run deploy:publish
scripts.bump:minor:deploy:publish: node bump.js minor && npm run deploy:publish
scripts.bump:major:deploy:publish: node bump.js major && npm run deploy:publish
